title: Google hit with $1 billion fine for breaking EU antitrust rules
summary: Google is required to change its policies for both Search and the Play Store. A €460 million fine has been issued to Google for giving preferential treatment to its own Shopping, Hotels, and Flights services in Google Search results.
caption: output/2026-07-23/google-hit-with-1-billion-fine-for-breaking-eu-antitrust-rules.txt
